case_title: ANIKA RAQUEL GARTENBAUM VS. ZIPCAR, INC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-25-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZIPCAR, INC
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ZIPCAR, INC
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $984.00 FILED BY GARTENBAUM, ANIKA RAQUEL AS TO DEFENDANT ZIPCAR, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CSC - LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARTENBAUM, ANIKA RAQUEL AS TO DEFENDANT ZIPCAR, INC
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, REQUESTING LAST NAME BE CORRECTED FROM GAFTENBAUM TO GARTENBAUM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARTENBAUM, ANIKA RAQUEL
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL DENIED BECAUSE(THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST. )
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 8/6/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN J- UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARTENBAUM, ANIKA RAQUEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
